description: Comprehensive agent meeting: Pull all performance data (posts published, metrics, follower growth), read the latest scout report and strategy files, then have Strategist conduct a full strategic review covering: (1) honest progress audit with real numbers, (2) why current strategy isn't delivering, (3) integrate the 0→1000 framework from the article (persona design, story arc, profile optimization, dwell time, algorithm understanding - 設計×心理×アルゴリズム), (4) revised daily action plan with specific changes, (5) path to 1000 followers with milestones. The article key points: research 30 accounts first, persona design targeting emotions not desires, character×worldview×consistency, profile must answer who/what/why, initial 30-50 posts before expecting growth, algorithm values 初速反応率→滞在時間→プロフィール遷移率, engagement should feel 1-on-1 personal. Current status: EN active via @meruru_tcbn (few posts published, minimal growth), JP suspended. Output as meeting minutes JSON at data/agent_meeting_20260310.json, then generate HTML report and send via Telegram.
notes: Operator is frustrated with lack of progress. This needs to be brutally honest about what's not working. Include the full 0→1000 framework from the Japanese article. Focus on actionable changes, not theory. Compare our approach vs what successful accounts do. Meeting minutes should read like a real team discussion with different perspectives.
